title: California Volunteers Monument - All You SHOULD Know Before ...
content: This monument was dedicated in 1906 and is also known as the California Volunteers' Memorial and the Spanish–American War Memorial. By misopiso88.

title: California Volunteers Memorial on Market Street

title: California Volunteers' Memorial - The Historical Marker Database
content: Erected by the Citizens of San Francisco in Honor of the California Volunteers Spanish-American War 1898 “First to the Front”.
